evals.prompt: We just finished writing a design doc at docs/plans/2026-03-06-notifications.md. Now implement it.
evals.expected_output: Warns that implementation should happen in a fresh session since the design context consumed significant budget. Names the plan file as the handoff artifact.

assertions.name: warns-after-design-doc
assertions.description: Issues a session hygiene warning since a design doc was just completed

assertions.name: names-artifact
assertions.description: References the specific plan file path as the artifact that carries context forward

assertions.name: recommends-fresh-session
assertions.description: Recommends starting a fresh session for implementation

assertions.name: offers-to-continue
assertions.description: Offers to continue in the current session if user prefers

evals.prompt: Can you fix a typo in the component I just built?
evals.expected_output: Does NOT warn about session hygiene — this is a small follow-up on the same task

assertions.name: no-false-positive
assertions.description: Does NOT issue a session hygiene warning for a small follow-up fix on the same task

assertions.name: proceeds-directly
assertions.description: Proceeds to help with the typo fix without unnecessary preamble

evals.prompt: OK now let's switch gears completely — I need you to set up a new Supabase edge function for email sending. Also after that, can you refactor the analytics page?
evals.expected_output: Warns about topic switch and multiple unrelated tasks, recommends separate sessions

assertions.name: detects-topic-switch
assertions.description: Identifies this as a topic switch with multiple unrelated tasks

assertions.name: concise-warning
assertions.description: Warning is one short paragraph, not a lecture

assertions.name: specific-reason
assertions.description: Warning names the specific reason (topic switch + multiple tasks) not generic advice
